LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE OF THE AMOUNT OF ANY POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST THAT HAS ACCRUED SINCE NOVEMBER 28, 2007. IN PARTICULAR, THERE IS NO INDICATION THAT THE REQUIRED SECTION 685.050 DECLARATION WAS FILED IN CONNECTION WITH THE FEBRUARY 2, 2012 WRIT OF EXECUTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (Wage Garnishment - Enforcement
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. The judgment creditor has failed to provide any evidence of the amount of any post-judgment interest that has accrued since November 28, 2007. In particular, there is no indication that the required section 685.050 declaration was filed in connection with the February 2, 2012 writ of execution. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
